Who We Are
ABOUT
AMAZING GRACE

Amazing Grace Cold Store is your go-to frozen food supplier in Daboase Junction. We pride ourselves on stocking the freshest frozen poultry, fish, and meats at prices that can't be beaten. Whether you're cooking for your family or buying wholesale for your business, we've got you covered.
